headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Quanta Services Over AECOM
summary: AECOM (NYSE:ACM) is one of the stocks on which Jim Cramer gave his opinions. A caller asked whether ACM is a buy and, if not, what a good alternative would be. In response, Cramer said: Yeah, they didn’t have a good quarter, and it’s a good company, but they did not have a good quarter. […]

headline: Quanta Services to Host & Webcast its 2026 Investor Day
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced that it will host and webcast its 2026 Investor Day from New York City on Tues., Mar. 31, 2026. Management intends to present certain information and engage in a question-and-answer discussion focused on the company's strategic initiatives and new long-term financial targets.
